entry.title: Orca: The World is in Your Mind
entry.summary: We introduce Orca, an initial instantiation of a general world foundation model. Orca learns a unified world latent space from multimodal world signals and exposes it through multimodal readout interf... \u00b7 Upvotes: 230 \u00b7 Authors: Yihao Wang, Yuheng Ji, Mingyu Cao

entry.title: Unlimited OCR Works
entry.summary: Recently, end-to-end OCR models, exemplified by DeepSeek OCR, have once again thrust OCR into the spotlight. entry.title: Kairos: A Native World Model Stack for Physical AI

entry.title: LoopCoder-v2: Only Loop Once for Efficient Test-Time Computation Scaling

entry.title: Looped World Models
entry.summary: Current world models face a fundamental tension: faithful long-horizon simulation demands deep computation, but deeper models are expensive to deploy and prone to compounding errors. We resolve this b... \u00b7 Upvotes: 476 \u00b7 Authors: Hongyuan Adam Lu, Z. L. Victor Wei, Qun Zhang

entry.title: VibeThinker-3B: Exploring the Frontier of Verifiable Reasoning in Small Language Models
entry.summary: This technical report introduces VibeThinker-3B, a compact dense model with 3B parameters developed to investigate how far verifiable reasoning can be pushed within a strictly small-model regime. Buil... \u00b7 Upvotes: 121 \u00b7 GitHub Stars: 1452 \u00b7 Authors: Sen Xu, Shixi Liu, Wei Wang

entry.title: JoyAI-VL-Interaction: Real-Time Vision-Language Interaction Intelligence
entry.summary: Many moments in the real world do not wait for a user to ask. entry.title: ABot-Earth 0.5: Generative 3D Earth Model
entry.summary: We present ABot-Earth 0.5, a generative 3D framework designed to synthesize vast, seamless 3D environments from ubiquitous, geospatially referenced satellite imagery. entry.title: SIA: Self Improving AI with Harness & Weight Updates
